name: Salmon Crunch Pie
recipeInstructions:
For the crust: Combine flour and salt in a bowl. Cut in shortening until mixture is crumbly. Stir in Cheddar cheese and walnuts. Set aside 1/4 cup of the mixture for topping. Press the remaining flour mixture onto the bottom and sides of a well-greased 9-inch pie plate. Refrigerate until chilled.
For the filling: In a bowl, beat eggs. Blend in Swiss cheese, sour cream, onion, mayonnaise, and salt. Fold in flaked salmon. Pour the salmon mixture into the prepared pie plate. Sprinkle the reserved flour mixture on top. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 35 to 40 minutes or until a knife inserted comes out clean. Serve hot.
